name: dspack-to-a2ui
description: Proof-of-concept: compile a dspack design-system contract into a valid A2UI catalog and render it through the React A2UI renderer.

scripts.build:catalogs: tsx src/cli.ts --in input/shadcn-ui.dspack.json --a2ui-version 0.9.1 --out out && tsx src/cli.ts --in input/shadcn-ui.dspack.json --a2ui-version 1.0 --out out
